items.claim: Cody Durden possesses elite chain wrestling and maintains a strong pace over three rounds.
items.quote: Cody Durden, elite chain wrestling, strong pace over three rounds

items.claim: Alejandro Costa has superior striking, faster hands, and a dangerous submission game.
items.quote: better striking, better better hands, faster hands, knockout power, and definitely definitely a dangerous submission game.

items.claim: Historically, wrestlers have given Alejandro Costa tough moments in fights.
items.quote: Historically, a lot of wrestlers have given Costa some tough moments.

items.claim: Ryan Gandara has explosive knockout power, relentless forward pressure, and excellent striking defense.
items.quote: Explosive knockout power, relentless forward pressure, and excellent striking defense.

items.claim: Zac Reese has a 5-inch reach advantage over Ryan Gandara.
items.quote: this dude has a 5-in reach advantage in this fight

items.claim: Damian Pinas carries his power into deep fights.
items.quote: carries powers into deep deep fights.

items.claim: Cezar Almeida possesses world-class kickboxing pedigree with elite timing and accuracy.
items.quote: world-class kickboxing pedigree, we spoke about that, elite timing and accuracy.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez has strong cardio over three rounds and a proven ability to grind out decisions.
items.quote: strong cardio over three rounds and definitely proven ability to um grind out fights and win decisions.

items.claim: Kang Wang is improving defensively in the grappling department.
items.quote: improving defensively when it comes to the grappling department.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has been dropped multiple times in his career.
items.quote: He has been dropped multiple times.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez is durable, technical, and possesses power in his hands.
items.quote: Adrian Yanez is very durable, very technical, and has power in those hands.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has outstanding takedown defense and excellent counter-striking.
items.quote: outstanding takedown defense, fast hands, good footwork, excellent counter striking
